JwtSettings._comment_SecretKey: IMPORTANT: Override this value via environment variable JwtSettings__SecretKey or user secrets in production.

OpenAI._comment_ApiKey: Set via environment variable OpenAI__ApiKey or user secrets.

EmailSettings._comment_SmtpHost: Default is smtp.gmail.com. Override via environment variable EmailSettings__SmtpHost or user secrets if using a different provider.
EmailSettings._comment_SenderEmail: Must match the authenticated Gmail address. Override via environment variable EmailSettings__SenderEmail or user secrets.
EmailSettings._comment_Username: Override via environment variable EmailSettings__Username or user secrets.
EmailSettings._comment_Password: Use a Gmail App Password (not your account password). Override via environment variable EmailSettings__Password or user secrets.
